purpose: Explain every preserved untracked OTLP audit-test file without deleting, overwriting, or silently adopting stale-API tests.

policy.module_declaration_policy: blocked preserved files must not be listed from src/observability/mod.rs until they compile against real production seams
policy.fallback_decision: keep asupersync-q94ai8 and asupersync-wqsael blocked by asupersync-lf1a77 until the preserved tests are normalized or split into narrower blockers

proof_commands.production_lib_check: rch exec -- cargo check -p asupersync --lib --features metrics,tracing-integration
proof_commands.blocked_full_test_check: rch exec -- cargo check -p asupersync --lib --tests --features metrics,tracing-integration

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 100-percent sampler/drop behavior and explicit no-export accounting
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: head-based sampling plus OTLP exporter drop counters
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with existing sampling/drop fixtures without losing zero-export assertions

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 100 Continue informational responses are not terminal OTLP responses
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: OTLP HTTP status classifier and HTTP response handling
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: split from stale fake HTTP audit module before production-seam normalization

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 401/403 authentication failures are terminal non-retryable drops
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: OTLP HTTP status classifier and retry policy
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with status-classification table tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 405 method-not-allowed responses are deterministic non-retryable client errors
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: OTLP HTTP status classifier
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with 4xx status-classification table tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 408 timeout responses follow the supported retry/fallback policy
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: retry scheduler and timeout classifier
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: dedupe with retry-after and transport timeout fixtures

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 414 URI-too-long responses are terminal and redact endpoint details
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: OTLP HTTP status classifier and endpoint sanitization
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with 4xx terminal classifier tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 429 rate limits honor retry-after and bounded retry counters
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: retry-after parser and retry budget
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with tracked retry-after coverage

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 502 gateway failures are retryable with bounded recovery accounting
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: OTLP HTTP status classifier and retry policy
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with 5xx retry classifier tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 503 retry-after zero does not spin and remains budget bounded
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: retry-after parser, backoff floor, and retry budget
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with retry-after edge-case table tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 504 gateway timeout is retryable with deterministic fallback accounting
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: OTLP HTTP status classifier and retry policy
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with 5xx retry classifier tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: 511 network-auth-required is treated as terminal operator action
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: OTLP HTTP status classifier and auth redaction
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with auth/client-error table tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: cancelled exports account for span loss instead of silently dropping data
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: cancellation path, exporter queue drain, and cancellation counters
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with load-shedding and graceful-shutdown loss accounting

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: truncated or malformed chunked collector responses are transport failures
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: HTTP response body validation and collector response parser
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with collector-misbehavior fixtures

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: circuit breaker transitions are deterministic and recoverable
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: OTLP exporter circuit breaker and recovery counters
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with retry/drop/recovery table fixtures

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: collector protocol misbehavior is classified without panics or secret leaks
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: collector response parser and error taxonomy
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with malformed-response fixtures

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: deep span hierarchy serialization stays bounded and parent links are preserved
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: span semantics serializer and hierarchy projection
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with span semantics conformance tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: DNS resolution failures are retryable transport errors with sanitized host logging
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: endpoint resolver and transport error classifier
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with TLS/transport failure table tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: empty attribute keys are dropped before OTLP serialization
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: attribute serializer
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with existing attribute-size/key validation tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: empty resource attributes are filtered without dropping valid resource identity
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: resource attribute merger and serializer
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with resource-attribute precedence and merging tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: high-volume export latency remains bounded and logs p50/p95/p99/drop counters
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: LoadSheddingTraceExporter and bounded export queue
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: convert to deterministic smoke/bench proof instead of timing-flaky unit test

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: parent sampling decisions propagate without resurrecting dropped spans
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: W3C trace context and head-based sampler
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with sampling strategy and propagation tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: programmatic, environment, and default resource attributes merge in stable precedence order
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: resource attribute builder
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with tracked resource detection/merging tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: repeated span status updates are idempotent and deterministic under the chosen OTLP status policy
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: span semantics status transition logic
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with span status conformance tests and last-write/idempotency table fixtures

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: incomplete spans dropped under cancellation are not exported or synthetic-ended
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: span semantics lifecycle state and explicit end-time export eligibility
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with span lifecycle cancellation/drop fixtures

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: sensitive span attributes are filtered before serialization
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: SpanConfig and span attribute serializer
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with privacy-aware ordered_proto_attributes tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: span attributes serialize in deterministic key/value order
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: ordered OTLP attribute serializer
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with golden serializer snapshots

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: TLS handshake failures are retryable transport errors with sanitized peer details
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: TLS connector and transport error classifier
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with DNS/transport failure table tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: tokio-compat boundary preserves span context without pulling tokio into core runtime
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: asupersync-tokio-compat boundary and span propagation
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: move to compat crate or cross-crate conformance harness

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: trace-state escaping preserves vendor entries and rejects invalid bytes
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: W3C trace-state parser/serializer
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with trace-state propagation tests

preserved_untracked_files.invariant: invalid UTF-8-like attribute content is sanitized or rejected deterministically
preserved_untracked_files.production_seam: attribute serializer and error taxonomy
preserved_untracked_files.deduplication_decision: merge with attribute serializer table tests

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate that every preserved OTLP audit file is mapped to a blocker bead and no blocked file is accidentally compiled as a module.
